series_metadata.series_description: This record series consists of undeliverable mail from the Business Services Division which includes, but is not limited to, agent registration notifications, approval certificates, biennial notifications, CCE notifications, name registrations, renewal notifications (trade names, fictitious name, trademark, service mark), RXM notifications (cancelled in error by tax department), tax cancellations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Scan documents and check completeness ; Electronic: Scanned images are retained four (4) years
